questionHtml: Complete the diagram, with a Newtonian mounting, continuing the two rays to show how they pass through the eyepiece.
markschemeHtml:
plane mirror to the left of principal focus tilted anti-clockwise

two rays which would go through the principal focus

two rays cross between mirror and eyepiece AND passing through the eyepiece

eg:

meta.title: Complete the diagram, with a Newtonian mounting, continuing the two rays to show how they pass through the eyepiece.
